milestones.title: Next Level Software Engineering
milestones.description: Currently enrolled in Programming Hero's Next Level Software Engineering course. Expanding expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Next.js, scalable backend architecture, authentication, cloud deployment, testing, and modern AI technologies including LLMs, LangChain, RAG, embeddings, and AI workflow automation.

milestones.title: Build Projects
milestones.description: Shipped multiple e-commerce projects, building complete shopping experiences from product catalogs to checkout and payment integration.

milestones.title: MERN Stack Web Development Bootcamp
milestones.description: Completed Programming Hero's comprehensive MERN stack focused web development course. Mastered React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB end-to-end.

milestones.title: UI/UX Design Foundation
milestones.description: Enrolled and completed UI/UX design course. Learned design fundamentals, user research, and prototyping to build better user experiences.

milestones.title: Started Self-Taught Coding Journey
milestones.description: Taught myself HTML, CSS, WordPress, and XAMPP localhost setup. Built my first websites and started exploring web development.
